summary: Raw, shaky handheld/cellphone footage of HSI/ICE agents in camo wrestling and restraining suspects on the ground and frisking a man against a chain-link fence in an industrial area, capped only by a standard ICE/DHS logo end card. There is no music-video stylization, fast-cutting, color grading, or genre framing - it is unedited grab footage documenting a violent arrest. Despite a high automated music_score, the visuals are clearly raw enforcement footage, which is out of scope.
